MR. BORRIS INFORMS THE COURT THAT A DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED BY OCTOBER 11, 2016. IF A DISMISSAL IS FILED BY OCTOBER 11, 2016 THE OCTOBER 21, 2016 HEARING DATE WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Borris, 510-581-7111 for Defendant/cross-complaintant Irwin Welker. (courtcall)
George Lazar, 619-595-7187 for Cross-defendant Umpqua Bank.

Argued Counsel for both parties state that a dismissal of the cross-complaint has not been filed and request a continuance. The Court informs counsel that a dismissal of the cross-compliant was filed October 19, 2016. The Court rules as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT UMPQUA BANK DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed on October 6, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Continued To Nov-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2016 Continued To Oct-21-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Borris, 510-581-7111 for Defendant/Cross-complainant Irwin Welker. (courtcall)
George Lazar, 619-595-7187 for Cross-Defendant/Moving party Umpqua Bank. (courtcall)

Not argued. The Court rules as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT UMPQUA BANK DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to October 21, 2016 for counsel for cross-complainant, Robert Borris, Jr, to comply with the Court's ordered to file, serve and provide a courtesy copy of a Declaration explaining his (1) failure to comply with CCP 430.41; (2) failure to comply with CCP 1005; and (3) failure to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B. Mr. Borris informs the Court that a dismissal will be filed by October 11, 2016. If a dismissal is filed by October 11, 2016 the October 21, 2016 hearing date will be taken off calendar. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Continued To Aug-31-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
